name: cpig-bool-refactor-03-union-mixed-types
description: CPigUnion of LIBFIVE sphere + PROCEDURAL unified TPMS. Exercises the STRUCTURED COMPOSITE PATH in field_binary_impl (implicit_field.cpp:759+ — mixed types → Kind::UNION structured composite, NOT the procedural-closure that Phase 1 replaced). Phase 1's evaluate() Kind::UNION arm must produce identical results to the prior closure (min over children). RedisplayFields still passes composite_mode=AUTO so the export voxel-bakes the composite as one dense atom (today's known behavior — bug 0021 — not yet fixed; the visible fix lands in Phase 8). The TEST GATE here is: did the boolean COMPLETE without crashing or producing NaN? WaitForPenumbraFrame confirms a real frame presented.

checkpoints.name: union-mixed-types
checkpoints.description: Sphere (libfive) unioned with unified Gyroid TPMS (procedural). Composes via Kind::UNION structured composite. Today's AUTO export voxel-bakes the whole composite (bug 0021 — the gyroid lattice fattens to a solid block; visible fix lands in Phase 8). Pass criterion for this test: boolean completes, a real frame presents.
